content:
𝗥𝗘𝗗𝗗𝗢𝗪𝗡𝗟𝗢𝗔𝗗𝗘𝗥 | Downloading media content from Reddit posts without the need for complex API setup or authentication.  📈 Growing!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Downloading media content from Reddit posts without the need for complex API setup or authentication.
📅 Created: Oct 2021 • Updated: Jul 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Download media (images, videos, galleries) from Reddit posts
✅ No Reddit API authentication (praw bot) required
✅ Single-line download function
✅ Customizable output filename and destination path
✅ Selectable video quality (144p to 1080p)
✅ Automatic detection of media type
✅ Handles galleries by creating dedicated folders


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 149 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 22 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

RedDownloader is a Python library designed to simplify the process of downloading various media types, including images, galleries, and videos, directly from Reddit posts. It offers an easy-to-use interface that does not require Reddit API authentication, allowing users to download content with a single line of code and customize output options like filename, destination, and video quality.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Jackhammer9/RedDownloader

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗟𝗘𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗠-𝗠𝗘𝗗𝗜𝗔-𝗗𝗢𝗪𝗡𝗟𝗢𝗔𝗗𝗘𝗥 | To allow users to download media content from Telegram web that is otherwise restricted or unavailable for download.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To allow users to download media content from Telegram web that is otherwise restricted or unavailable for download.
📅 Created: Jun 2022 • Updated: Jul 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Enables downloading of images, GIFs, audio, and videos from Telegram web.
✅ Bypasses download restrictions in chats and stories.
✅ Supports specific Telegram webapp versions for certain features (e.g., audio messages for K webapp).
✅ Installs via user script managers like Tampermonkey, Greasemonkey, or Violentmonkey.


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 477 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 62 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This JavaScript user script enhances the Telegram web experience by enabling the download of media (images, GIFs, audio, videos) from chats and stories, even when downloads are restricted. It requires a user script manager browser extension for installation and use.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Neet-Nestor/Telegram-Media-Downloader

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗚𝗥𝗜𝗦𝗧-𝗖𝗢𝗥𝗘 | Running a powerful server for hosting and managing relational spreadsheets.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Running a powerful server for hosting and managing relational spreadsheets.
📅 Created: May 2020 • Updated: Jul 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Relational spreadsheet model
✅ Database-like columns (named, single data type)
✅ Formula filling with automatic updates
✅ Python formula support
✅ AI Formula Assistant
✅ Portable, self-contained format based on SQLite
✅ Server for hosting spreadsheets


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 594 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 611 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Grist is a modern relational spreadsheet application that combines the flexibility of a spreadsheet with the robustness of a database. The grist-core repository provides the server-side functionality for hosting and managing these advanced spreadsheets.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆
